title: Rainbow Streets of Balat
description: Spend a themed day in Istanbul: colorful houses of Balat, Aziz George Cathedral, Istanbul, Maison Balat, Dea Cafe Balat.
notes: Snap photos between the colorful facades.
Get a feel for the neighborhood's historic atmosphere.
Discover hidden treasures among old antiques.
Take a break at a modest cafe on the street.
Visit the historic fountain for a refreshing break.
